name: performance_three_site_bandit_cannibal_v0_2026-04-29
description: Blocked direct-range three-site performance-audit footing: starts from the green two-site remembered-lead bandit plus direct-range cannibal fixture, then seeds a second camp-shaped cannibal_camp 10 OMT west of the player. Run 20260429_035001 showed this footing proves both added cannibal sites bootstrapped and dispatched, but only reaches sites=3 active_sites=2 because the two direct-range cannibal sites consume the live player-pressure cap before the remembered-lead bandit camp dispatches. Retain as cap/interference evidence, not as a green three-active-site row.
